buildings_guide.note: Key building thresholds and unlocks for Season 2. Max level for all buildings is 35. Levels 31-35 require Age of Oil event (post Season 2) and Base Expansion research in Oil tech tree.
buildings_guide.advanced_levels_note: Levels 31-35 require Age of Oil event + Base Expansion research in Oil tech tree. Introduces Oil as a new resource.

Headquarters.priority: CRITICAL - upgrade first at every HQ level
Headquarters.function: Defines your level. Unlocks all other buildings. Increases hero level cap.

key_thresholds.HQ_20_25: Mid game critical phase - resource grind begins

Tech_Center.priority: CRITICAL - always keep pace with HQ
Tech_Center.function: Unlocks research trees. Special Forces tree unlocks T10 troops.

key_thresholds.lv20: Unlocks Special Forces research tree (T10 troops)

Barracks.function: Trains troops. Higher levels unlock higher tier troops and increase training cap.

Wall.priority: HIGH - required for HQ upgrades, reduces casualties
Wall.function: Reduces fire damage to base. Reduces troop casualty rate when breached.

key_thresholds.general: Keep pace with HQ - often a requirement for HQ upgrades

Tank_Center.priority: HIGH for Tank players - max out
Tank_Center.function: Increases Tank hero stats (HP, Attack, Defense) and march size.

Air_Center.priority: HIGH for Aircraft players - max out
Air_Center.function: Increases Aircraft hero stats and march size.

Missile_Center.priority: HIGH for Missile players - max out
Missile_Center.function: Increases Missile hero stats and march size.

key_thresholds.general: Max out for your troop type - same stat structure as Tank/Air Center

Drill_Ground.function: Increases number of troops that can be stationed.

key_thresholds.general: Keep upgraded - more stationed troops = better defense

Hospital.function: Injured troops go here instead of being lost. Higher levels = more capacity.

key_thresholds.general: Upgrade when HQ requires it. More capacity = fewer permanent losses in PvP.

Emergency_Center.function: Additional hospital capacity for overflow troops.

key_thresholds.general: Upgrade after main Hospital. Provides extra safety net.

Chip_Lab.priority: HIGH - critical for skill chip system (unlocks day 82)
Chip_Lab.function: Crafts drone skill chips. Higher levels unlock legendary chips.

Gear_Factory.function: Crafts and upgrades hero gear. Higher levels unlock better gear.

key_thresholds.general: Keep at lv20 minimum. Blueprints are the bottleneck, not factory level.

Alliance_Center.function: Required to join alliances. Higher levels increase alliance helps received.

Alert_Tower.function: Defines scout report detail and anti-scout probability.

key_thresholds.lv10: Reveals Squad Power in enemy scout

Squad.function: Allows hero squads. Higher levels increase march speed.

key_thresholds.general: Up to 3 squads available. Keep Squad 1 highest level.

Builders_Hut.function: Increases free speedup time on building upgrades.

Tavern.function: Hero and survivor recruitment. Higher levels reduce free recruitment cooldown.

key_thresholds.general: Keep at lv20 minimum for hero recruitment efficiency.
Low priority - events give better hero EXP.

Component_Factory.function: Produces drone components for drone equipment upgrades.

key_thresholds.general: Keep upgraded alongside drone level progression.

Drone_Parts_Workshop.function: Produces drone parts. Higher levels increase production rate.

key_thresholds.general: Drone parts are scarce - keep this building upgraded.

Smelter.function: Generates ore for hero gear upgrades.

key_thresholds.general: Ore is the main gear crafting material - keep upgraded.
Low ROI - not a priority building.

Armament_Institute.function: Researches 4 Armaments to unlock T11 troops.

Recon_Plane.function: Scouts other players. Higher levels increase plane speed.

key_thresholds.general: In Season 2: Recon Aircraft also heats allied bases (+4C at lv2).

Farmland.function: Food production. Events give better food.

Gold_Mine.function: Gold production. Events give better gold.

Iron_Mine.function: Iron production. Events give better iron.

High_Heat_Furnace.function: Heats base. Increases virus resistance. At lv30 unlocks 3 military buildings.

key_thresholds.lv30: Unlocks Tank Base, Air Force Base, Missile Base S2 (up to +15% damage bonus at lv30)

Titanium_Alloy_Factory.priority: CRITICAL in Season 2 - build on Day 1
Titanium_Alloy_Factory.function: Produces Titanium Alloy from Coal. Used to upgrade High-Heat Furnace.

key_thresholds.lv15: Unlocks next factory (up to 4 total, 5th via Weekly Pass)

Titanium_Alloy_Factory.upgrade_order: Upgrade Factory 1 to lv15, then unlock Factory 2, repeat. Upgrade gifted Weekly Pass factory LAST.

Tank_Base_S2.function: Additional stats to Tank heroes. Extension of Tank Center.

Air_Force_Base_S2.function: Additional stats to Aircraft heroes. Extension of Air Center.

Missile_Base_S2.function: Additional stats to Missile heroes. Extension of Missile Center.

hq_level_context.HQ_1_19: Early game - upgrade everything to keep pace with HQ. Focus on Tech Center.
hq_level_context.HQ_20_25: Mid game critical phase - unlock Special Forces (T10), focus military centers and barracks.
hq_level_context.HQ_26_30: Late game competitive - push toward T10/T11, max military centers, push Chip Lab to lv20.
hq_level_context.HQ_27_plus: Armament Institute unlocks - prioritize to access T11 troops research.
hq_level_context.HQ_31_35: Requires Age of Oil event post-Season 2. Oil becomes a new resource.
